metadata.title: Outsmarting Enemies with a Calm 2v1 Site Hold in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Caught a tight 2v1 site hold with smart positioning and steady aim. Watch how patience and timing make all the difference in this clutch moment.
What’s your favorite site to defend in VALORANT?

Share your best clutch moments in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #clutch #fps
